sourcesContent:
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import Tesseract from 'tesseract.js'; import { jsPDF } from "jspdf"; import { supabase } from './supabaseClient'; import { UserCircle2, LayoutDashboard, Heart, ClipboardList, LogOut, Zap, Menu, Activity, FileText, Droplets, Brain, Beaker, Plus, X, FolderUp, Edit3 } from 'lucide-react'; import './Dashboard.css'; const Dashboard = ({ user, onLogout }) => { const [profile, setProfile] = useState(null); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); const [isAnalysing, setIsAnalysing] = useState(false); // Modals const [showClinicalModal, setShowClinicalModal] = useState(false); const [showProfileModal, setShowProfileModal] = useState(false); const [selectedFiles, setSelectedFiles] = useState([]); const [formData, setFormData] = useState({ full_name: '', phone: '', address: '', gender: 'Male', age: '', weight: '', height: '', bp_sys: '', bp_dia: '', sugar: '', creatine: '', smoking: 'No', alcohol: 'No', activity: 'Sedentary', sleep: '8', notes: '' }); const getProfile = async () => { if (!user) return; try { let { data, error } = await supabase.from('profiles').select('*').eq('id', user.id).single(); if (data) { setProfile(data); setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, ...data })); } } catch (err) { console.error("Profile Load Error:", err); } finally { setLoading(false); } }; useEffect(() => { if (user) getProfile(); }, [user]); const handleInputChange = (e) => { const { name, value } = e.target; setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, [name]: value })); }; const handleSaveProfile = async () => { try { const sanitizedData = { id: user.id, ...formData }; const { data } = await supabase.from('profiles').upsert(sanitizedData).select().single(); setProfile(data); setShowProfileModal(false); alert("Profile Saved!"); } catch (err) { alert(err.message); } }; const runAnalysisAndDownload = async () => { setIsAnalysing(true); let finalData = { ...formData }; try { if (selectedFiles.length > 0) { const imageUrl = URL.createObjectURL(selectedFiles[0]); const { data: { text } } = await Tesseract.recognize(imageUrl, 'eng'); URL.revokeObjectURL(imageUrl); const sugarMatch = text.match(/(?:glucose|sugar|glu)\D+(\d{2,3})/i); const creatineMatch = text.match(/(?:creatinine|crea)\D+(\d?\.?\d)/i); if (sugarMatch) finalData.sugar = sugarMatch[1]; if (creatineMatch) finalData.creatine = creatineMatch[1]; } const sanitizedData = { id: user.id, ...finalData }; const { data: updatedProfile } = await supabase.from('profiles').upsert(sanitizedData).select().single(); setProfile(updatedProfile); // Simple PDF Generation (Kept from your original code) const doc = new jsPDF(); doc.text("CLINICAL ANALYSIS REPORT", 20, 20); doc.save(`Analysis_${Date.now()}.pdf`); setShowClinicalModal(false); } catch (err) { alert(err.message); } finally { setIsAnalysing(false); } }; if (loading) return
Loading Interface...
; const bmi = profile?.height && profile?.weight ? (profile.weight / (profile.height / 100) ** 2).toFixed(1) : '--'; const sysBP = profile?.bp_sys || '--'; const diaBP = profile?.bp_dia || '--'; const sugar = profile?.sugar || '--'; const creatine = profile?.creatine || '--'; return (
{/* HEADER */}

Welcome, {profile?.full_name?.split(' ')[0] || 'User'}
{/* LEFT SIDEBAR */}

SYSTEM INTEGRITY

HIPAA Compliant Protocol
{/* MAIN CONTENT */}

Clinical Overview

{/* PURPLE BANNER */}
{profile?.full_name || 'Patient'}
ID: {user.id.slice(0,8)} | {profile?.age || '--'} Yrs | {profile?.gender || 'Male'}
BP: {sysBP}/{diaBP} Sugar: {sugar} mg/dL Smoking: {profile?.smoking || 'No'} Activity: {profile?.activity || 'Sedentary'} Sleep: {profile?.sleep || '8'}h
{/* VITALS CARDS */}
Cardiac
{sysBP}/{diaBP}
mmHg
Renal

mg/dL

mg/dL

Clinical Summary

{profile?.age || '--'} Yrs
Status: Stable

Body Composition

{bmi} BMI
{bmi > 25 ? 'Overweight Range' : 'Normal Range'}
{/* PATHOLOGICAL FORECAST */}
Critical Pathological Forecast
Neuro-Cardiac Pathway
  • Silent Heart Attack (Ischemia)
  • Ischemic Stroke / Nerve Blocking
  • Myocardial Infarction
Status: Low probability based on current arterial pressure.
Renal Failure Pathway
  • Dialysis Dependency Condition
  • Stage 3/4 Kidney Failure (CKD)
  • Chronic Nephron Scarring
Status: Normal filtration detected. Zero current markers.
Metabolic/Neural Pathway
  • Diabetic Neuropathy
  • Peripheral Nerve Blocking
  • Microvascular Tissue Damage
Status: Glucose management optimal; no active markers.
{/* CLINICAL REFERENCE GUIDE */}

Normal: <120High: 140+

Normal: 70-100Prediabetes: 100-125

Normal: 0.7-1.3Elevated: 1.3+

AI Health Forecasts

Glucose processing efficient. Stable energy predicted.
TIP: BALANCE INTAKE
{/* MODAL 1: CLINICAL INTELLIGENCE CENTER (New Analysis) */} {showClinicalModal && (

document.getElementById('file-upload').click()}>

)} {/* MODAL 2: PATIENT MEDICAL RECORD (Update Profile) */} {showProfileModal && (

); }; export default Dashboard;
